# Onbillo

Onbillo is a modern, community-powered billing & POS system built for Indian retail shops — from kirana stores to restaurants, supermarkets, and wholesale dealers.

## Details & Docs
- [Home Page](/index.md): The main landing page copy including product description, core capabilities (interactive POS checkout, mobile camera/hardware barcode scanning, dynamic GST compliance, thermal printer support, sales reports, inventory management, role-based staff management, settings, admin moderation, and offline-first resilience), setup guide, and FAQs.

## Feature Overview

### Interactive POS & Billing
- Real-time cart management and checkout.
- Text search and barcode lookup.
- Integrated camera scanning (WebAssembly + ZXing) with flash and camera facing controls.
- Dynamic GST calculation (Inclusive/Exclusive/No Tax modes).
- Optimized 3″ thermal receipt printing layout.

### Inventory & Global DB
- Shop inventory control with custom pricing.
- Community-powered global product barcode database.
- Curation pipeline for platform administrators.

### Roles & Admin
- Owner vs. Shop Worker (Cashier) permissions.
- Staff email invitation system.
- Administrative Console (`/admin`) for platform-level management of users, shops, and database approvals.
- Enforced `+91` 10-digit phone prefix validation.
